# Hyper Solutions

**Category:** Modular & Prefabricated Infrastructure  
**Website:** https://www.hypersolutions.com/

## Headline
Integrated modular AI infrastructure developer focused on packaging power, cooling, and deployment systems into faster-to-launch physical capacity.

## Overview
Hyper Solutions is relevant because it represents the kind of focused modular AI infrastructure player that sits between classic equipment vendors and larger data center operators. It belongs in the directory as a signal of where dense AI deployments may increasingly rely on integrated physical packaging rather than slower conventional build sequences.

## Key capabilities
- integrated modular infrastructure packaging
- deployment systems that combine enclosure, power, and cooling readiness
- relevance for faster-launch AI and regional compute environments

## Best fit for
- teams comparing modular deployment pathways against conventional buildouts
- buyers exploring regional AI capacity with tighter schedules
- operators looking for integrated physical system packaging rather than piecemeal sourcing

## Considerations
Best reviewed alongside modular shell, liquid cooling, and prefabricated power block vendors to separate full-system value from narrower subsystem capability.
